data.name: Galactic Pick Up Artist
data.detailed_description:
A dating-sim that augments your real life dating skills! Become the commander of a small science vessel (including a perverted AI), and meet the girls aboard your ship, all while training real life social skills. Can it get any better? Oh yes, it can. There’s Nudity (obviously).


All characters are over the age of 18

data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition

data.legal_notice: All characters in the game are 18+
